title.rendered: Asia Food Expo 2024 SEPTEMBER 4-7 WORLD TRADE CENTER PH

content.rendered:
The Asia Food Expo (AFEX) 2024 will take place from September 4th to 7th at the World Trade Center Metro Manila in Pasay City, Philippines. This exhibition, now in its 30th year, is a significant and expertise trade fair for food industry and packagings , you can find the latest ,newest and advance technology in food machinery, packaging equipments, and sauce filling machine . This expo is one of the most important event for networking, showcasing innovations, and making business connections across the food and beverage industry.The exhibiton will run daily from 10:00 AM to 6:00 PM and will feature various exhibitors and activities aimed at elevating and innovating food industry practices. If you’re planning to attend, welcome you visit our booth, and also you can purchase a visitor pass for PHP 500, which allows unlimited entry for all days of the event. Any help you can contact us .

Asia Food Expo 2024 Shanghai Npack Booth information

Shanghai Npack and its distributor will be exhibiting at the Asia Food Expo 2024, Npack will show its new technogloy and share new packaging idea with its visistors. Here we warmly invite our customers,friends and business partners to visit our booth at the exhibition. It offers an excellent opportunity to discuss potential collaborations, engage in meaningful conversations, and strengthen mutual trust. We look forward to meeting you at the expo to explore the latest industry developments and cooperation opportunities.

Asia Food Expo 2024 Shanghai Npack Booth information

Event Dates: September 4-7, 2024

Booth NO.:534 Name: RMEV ENTERPRISES Contact person:MR.dennis wei, whatisapp/wechat:13917774079
Location: World Trade Center Metro Manila, Pasay City, Philippines

We eagerly await your visit and look forward to a fruitful exchange!For more information, you can visit the official website
